action.reasoning: Observation: New best 0.8497 test bal_acc with no-DRW + logit adjustment + mixup/cutmix. Many-shot 0.91, few-shot 0.80. Analysis: Few-shot improving. ~2.68h remaining, 21 iters left. Could try: (1) Test-time augmentation (TTA) with horizontal flip — easy win, no retraining. (2) Train longer with EMA. (3) Try ConvNeXt-Small or larger backbone. Decision: First implement TTA in predict.py — cheap improvement. Then try ensembling/EMA in next iter.
action.command: python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/preds.json && python -c "import json; p=json.load(open('/tmp/preds.json'))['predictions']; print(len(p), p[:10])"
